raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Sentencing enhancements have not proven to deter crime nor reduce recidivism rates.",
    "Communities most impacted by high incarceration rates continue to experience high crime rates.",
    "Higher incarceration rates result in overcrowding of prisons and soaring costs to the taxpayer.",
    "The firearm does not need to be physically recovered for the enhancement to apply at trial.",
    "If a firearm is recovered, it does not need to be loaded or operable for the use enhancements to apply.",
    "Discriminatory criminal justice policies at all stages of the justice system have disadvantaged people of color.",
    "Research has shown little evidence that extreme sentence lengths deter people from committing crimes.",
    "Incapacitation offers diminishing returns as the prisoner ages, as criminal behavior and recidivism rates drop steadily throughout life.",
    "It currently costs California roughly $81,000 a year to incarcerate a person."
  ]
}
```
